title: 第 82 節
en: Doctrines borrowed by the Jews from the Zoroastrians, 47.
Dreams gave the first idea of soul, Driver, Dr., 53.
Dualism, not taught by Zoroaster, — of the Avesta, 185-186.
— replaces the original Monotheism, — no sign of, in the Veda, 187.
EARLY Christian view of the soul, — — language, Greek or Jewish?
— — philosophers taunted with borrowing from Greek, 415.
East, Greek philosophy borrowed from the, 8o.
East, not West, the place of the blessed, 139.
— and West blended in Christianity, Eastern religions, ignorant commentators on, 180.
Eckhart, Master, 90, 297, 457, 462, — suspected of heresy, 506, 508, — powerful sermons, 506.
— appeals to pagan masters, 507, — assertion of truth, 507.
